questionHtml:
Which molecules have at least one sp2 hybridized atom?

        I.     CH3COOH

        II.     CH3COCH3

        III.     CH2CHCH2OH

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III

meta.title: Which molecules have at least one sp2 hybridized atom? I. CH3COOH II. CH3COCH3 III. CH2CHCH2OH A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
